description: Blunt toed, black puma shoes with a leather upper Perforations, mesh and synthetic overlays on the upper for structure and ventilation Formstripe for added style and structure Mono-tongue construction for a glove-like Fit with central lace ups Branding at the tongue, side and back puma CELL padded insole which provides ever-lasting cushioning, support and comfort Mildly padded and reinforced heel collar TPU out-sole with an arched heel Airlock at the heel for shock absorption and grooves and lugs at the forefoot for grip and traction
